name: Nate Swenson
summary: Senior DevOps Engineer building AWS infrastructure with Terraform and GitHub Actions CI/CD. Led infrastructure engineering for major product releases at GoodLeap, designing cloud platforms and deployment pipelines. Mentored engineers while establishing automation standards across multiple teams.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
bullets: Led AWS infrastructure engineering for two major product releases, designing Terraform modules and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for reliable production delivery
Served as organizational SME for CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code, advancing automation and deployment reliability across multiple teams
Delivered Datadog observability dashboards and alerting for production infrastructure, improving incident response and operational maturity
Acted as subject-matter expert for Anthropic Claude platform, creating internal engineering tools that optimized debugging and incident resolution workflows
Mentored engineers on infrastructure automation, delivery pipelines, and modern cloud engineering practices
Led cross-team infrastructure consolidation ensuring scalable, maintainable, and production-ready systems for critical product launches

experience.title: Lead Associate (DevOps Engineering)
bullets: Led GitLab infrastructure management to enhance system reliability and support development needs
Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines and runner infrastructure enabling automated builds and deployments across engineering teams

experience.title: Lead Cloud Engineer
bullets: Lead engineer on cloud foundations team managing Ansible Tower for enterprise automation
Migrated Ansible Tower environment from version 3.6 to 3.8
Automated IAM policy assignment to S3 buckets using Lambda, DynamoDB, Jenkins, and Ansible Tower
Developed reusable Ansible templates for cloud and on-premise services
Coordinated team integration into Ansible Tower system

experience.title: Lead DevOps Engineer
bullets: Led technical engineering team delivering applications for government and military contracts, ensuring compliance and reliability
Achieved zero-downtime deployments using Jenkins CI/CD
Implemented container-based Jenkins architecture, enhancing deployment efficiency
Maintained Jenkins, Chef, and GitHub supporting integration and deployment across the organization

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
bullets: Led a distributed team building internal Agile and Engineering communities of practice across a 235K-person organization
Developed and delivered hands-on training focused on TDD, pair programming, and XP practices
Researched new trends and technologies for the engineering training curriculum
Managed and prioritized the community backlog

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Delivered zero-downtime deployments in OpenShift
Developed and maintained pipelines as code in Jenkins CI/CD
Automated E2E testing using Testcafe, Cucumber, Selenium, and Sauce Labs
Maintained and contributed to inner-source projects on GitHub
Active member of the internal engineering community, leading to promotion as DevOps Community Lead

optimizedBullets.original: Led infrastructure engineering for two major product releases (Payments and Roofing), designing and operating the deployment architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and supporting cloud infrastructure required for reliable production delivery.

optimizedBullets.original: Strengthened platform reliability and operational maturity while handling SRE DevOps platform engineering and operations functions.
